retrieved_result: Why Does Quantity Supplied Increase When Price Increases? World View Social Sciences Economics Q: Why Does Quantity Supplied Increase When Price Increases? A: Quick Answer The quantity of a particular good supplied in a market increases as price goes up because suppliers have an increased interest in producing goods to generate higher amounts of revenue. T
